title: lobelia heyneana
intro: Lobelia heyneana, also known as Indian tobacco or Kanthkali, is a plant species belonging to the Lobelia genus, native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various ailments due to its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Lobelia heyneana include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Lobelia heyneana include infusions, tinctures, and smoking mixtures, which are often used to treat respiratory and nervous system conditions.
